summary: Great audience recording of the 10/23/80 Radio City show with an epic acoustic set.
review: Both reviewers praise this performance, especially the acoustic portion which they call “truly epic.” The audience (AUD) recording is described as great, making the concert enjoyable despite the lack of detailed technical commentary. Overall the show is regarded as a standout entry from the fall ’80 tour that’s sadly overlooked.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviews (one 4‑star, one un‑rated but positive) highlight a strong performance and a good audience recording; limited data keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience recording praised as great with no reported dropouts or clarity issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong acoustic opening followed by solid electric sets; remembered fondly by those who attended.
